security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Native desktop client for the Monarch Command Center. Renders the bundled operator console locally and reaches the monarch substrate over Tailscale; fires native OS notifications on interrupt-class events.
